title: Source Ingestion, Parsing, OCR, Provenance, and Trust · Behavior Case: Rag Format Parser Contract
summary: A connector strips headings and page coordinates from mixed PDFs, silently skips parse failures, duplicates documents, and treats retrieved instructions as trusted application policy. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the format parser contract increment in provenance-preserving ingestion ledger. Learners prog…
objectives: Parse HTML, Markdown, PDF, office, JSON, email, and plain text through format-specific admission, size, recursion, and error contracts.
Inventory source owner, authority, location, version, time, license, access policy, checksum, parser, and lineage for every ingested document.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: rag-format-parser-contract — Parse HTML, Markdown, PDF, office, JSON, email, and plain text through format-specific admission, size, recursion, and error contracts.
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-ingestion-provenance-5
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-ingestion-provenance-5.
# Case 9036: a multilingual support escalation.
# Operating constraint: record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer.
def worked_rag_ingestion_provenance_5(source_id: str = "manual-v3", bytes_read: int = 4096, parse_errors: int = 0, licensed: bool = True, provenance_kept: bool = True, content_trusted: bool = False) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "corpusworked5",
        "query5dekrow",
        "tenant9036",
        "indexworked59036",
        "prompt5dekrow9036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if not source_id or bytes_read < 0:
        return False, bytes_read, "source-admission"
    if parse_errors > 0:
        return False, parse_errors, "parse-quarantine"
    if not licensed or not provenance_kept:
        return False, bytes_read, "provenance-policy"
    if content_trusted:
        return False, bytes_read, "data-is-not-instruction"
    assert source_id == "manual-v3"
    return True, bytes_read, "quarantined-source"

steps.title: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Format Parser Contract model · Theory Rag Format Parser Contract
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Rag Format Parser Contract: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory RAG engineering team handles case 5587 during a regulated document deletion request. Build deterministic Python evidence to admit parsed content with identity, provenance, licensing, quarantine, and untrusted-data boundaries; retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity; then replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Parse HTML, Markdown, PDF, office, JSON, email, and plain text through format-specific admission, size, recursion, and error contracts.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Format Parser Contract model · Theory Rag Format Parser Contract.
